name: personal-portfolio
description: This is a fully responsive personal portfolio website built using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript. The portfolio serves as a dynamic platform that highlights my growth, skills, and development journey as an aspiring Software Developer and Data Engineer. It features a modern, clean user interface with smooth animations, interactive components, and responsive layouts. This project reflects not only my technical ability, but also my attention to UI/UX design, performance optimization, and structured front-end architecture.
